text: === Me ya sa shugaban Iran ya nemi afuwar maƙwaftan ƙasar? ===
URL: [URL]
Shugaban ƙasar Iran Masoud Pezeshkian ya bai wa mutane da dama mamaki bayan ya nemi afuwar maƙwaftan ƙasar bisa ga hare-haren da ƙasar ta ƙaddamar a cikinsu.
Shugaban ya nemi afuwar ne a ranar Asabar, a matsayinsa na ɗaya daga cikin mambobin kwamitin riƙon-ƙwarya na jagorancin ƙasar.
Abu ne mai wahala wata ƙasa ta nemi afuwar wata, musamman a alokacin da ake gwabza yaƙi, haka nan ma kalmomin da ya yi amfani da su, sun ɗauki hankali.
A mafi yawan lokuta da wahala ka ga shugabanni sun yi amfani da kalamar "nadama", sannan kuma ba su cika ɗaukan alhaki ba kai-tsaye.

Amma shi Pezeshkian kai-tsaye ya amince cewa an kai farmaki kan ƙasashe masu maƙwaftaka sannan ya ce a yanzu an buƙaci dakaru su tsagaita daga kai musu hari har sai idan daga cikin ƙasashen ne aka kai wa Iran hari.
"Na ga dacewar na nemi afuwar ƙasashe maƙwafta waɗanda aka kai wa hari," in ji shi.
"Ba aniyarmu ba ne mu far wa maƙwaftanmu."
To sai dai tambayar ita ce: shin wannan neman afuwa ta kai zuci, kuma me ya sa sai yanzu?
Wata ƙila mataki ne na shugabancin ƙasar wajen ganin yankin bai hargitse ba.
Ƙasashe da dama na yankin sun samu kansu a tsakiyar musayar wuta tun bayan harin da Amurka da Isra'ila suka ƙaddamar kan Iran ranar Asabar 28 ga watan Fabarairu.
Pezeshkian ya bayyana cewa "dole ne" ta sanya Iran ta ƙaddamar da hare-hare bayan harin da aka kai mata wanda ya yi sanadiyyar kashe manyan jagorori da kwamandojin ƙasar.
Ta hanayr neman afuwa, Iran ta nuna cewa ba ta son yaƙi ya rincaɓe tsakaninta da maƙwaftanta.

Haka nan kuma saƙon na alamta halin da siyasar yankin ke ciki: Duk da cewa Amurka na da sansanoni da kuma dakaru a wasu daga cikin ƙasashen da ke maƙwaftaka da Iran, ƙasar za ta mayar da kanta saniyar ware idan ta riƙa kai musu hari.
Sai dai babu tabbas kan ko za a ga afuwar a aikace.
Rahotanni daga yankin na nuna cewa har yanzu Iran ba ta daina kai hare-hare ba.
Qatar da Haɗaɗɗiyar Daular Larabawa duk sun sanar da kakkaɓo makaman da Iran ta jefa musu.
Idan waɗannan hare-hare suka ci gaba, zai ɗora ayar tambaya kan ko akwai matsalar shugabanci a ƙasar ta Iran.

Tun bayan hare-haren farko da aka kai wa Iran waɗanda suka hallaka jagororin Iran, ciki har da jagoran addini na ƙasar Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, tafiyar da ƙasar ta koma hannun wani kwamitin riƙon-ƙwarya.
A rubuce, wannan tsari zai bai wa mutane irin su Pezeshkian ƙarin faɗa a ji, fiye da a baya lokacin da mutum ɗaya ke da wuƙa da nama.
A aikace kuwa, tsarin zai haifar da rashin tabbas kan wanda ke da ikon jan ragamar dakarun sojin ƙasar, masu matuƙar ƙarfi, kamar dakarun juyin juya-hali.

Idan har aka ci gaba da ganin Iran na lkai hare-hare maƙwafta duk da kalaman shugaban ƙasar, hakan zai nuna cewa ko dai akwai matsala game da tsarin isar da saƙo ko kuma akwai wadanda ke nuna turjiya game da batun rage kai hare-hare.
Masu ra'ayin mazan jiya da ke cikin harkar tsaro ta ƙasar sun daɗe suna ganin cewa matsin lamba ga ƙasashen yakin shi ne babban makamin da Iran za ta iya amfani da shi wajen kare kanta daga Isra'ila.
Martanin da aka samu daga cikin gida ya nuna rarrabuwar kai game da hakan.
Wasu masu ra'ayin riƙau a ƙasar sun soki lamirin kalaman shugaban ƙasar, inda suka bayyana kalaman a matsayin masu rauni.

Halin da siyasar ƙasar ciki yanzu yana da sammatsi: an kashe da dama daga cikin jagororin ƙasar waɗanda suka kasance masu tsattsauran ra'ayi, sauran da suka rage na ƙasa-ƙasa kuwa na yin taka-tsantsan.
Gare su, duk wani neman afuwa ga ƙasashen waje, tamkar miƙa wuya ne a wannan yanayi.
A wajen Iran kuwa, akwai martani daban-daban kan kamalam shugaban ƙasar.

Ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba, a shafinsa na sada zumunta, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya ce "Iran ta nemi afuwa kuma ta miƙa wuya" ga maƙwaftanta, inda ya ce matsin da Amurka da Isra'ila ke yi wa ƙasar na aiki.
Trump ya sha nanata cewa abu ɗaya da zai kawo ƙarshen rikicin Amurka da Iran shi ne idan Iran ɗin ta miƙa wuya.
Sai dai wannan tamkar abu ne mai wuya a harkar diflomasiyya.
A tarihi, abu ne mai wahala ka ga wata ƙasa ta miƙa wuya a lokacin rikicin, kawai a dalilin ruwan wuta ta sama, duk runtsi.
Sai dai idan an samu dakaru ta kasa waɗanda za su tursasa yin hakan.
Ga shugaba Pezeshkian da jagororin Iran, akwai yiwuwar abin da suke tunani daban ne.
Tsagaita wuta zai iya samar da wani ɗan sarari.
Idan har wanda ya samu muƙamin jagoran addini na Iran ya zama mai tsattsauran ra'ayi, kafar cimma mafita ta hanyar diflomasiyya za ta ƙara tsukewa.

Haka nan kuma hakan zai ƙara ɗiga wata ayar tambayar: shin hakan na nuna cewa Pezeshkian mutum ne mai sauƙi hali wanda za a iya tattaunawa da shi, irin shugaban da ƙasashen Yamma za fi son su yi hulɗa da shi?
A cikin jawabinsa, ya yi ƙoƙarin haɗa bu biyu wuri ɗaya, turjiya da kuma bude ƙofa.
Ya yi watsi da batun miƙa wuya, amma ya nuna buƙatar yin taka-tsantsan da ƙasashe maƙwafta.
A lokaci guda kuma, ana ci gaba da hasashen yadda jagorancin Iran zai kasance a nan gaba.
Manyan ƴan siyasa da malamai da kuma kwamandojin rundunar juyin juya hali za su iya ganin wannan a matsayin wata dama ta ƙarfafa kansu.
Idan har Pezeshkian ya gaza kawo daidaito da kuma nuna ƙarfin iko kan dakarun ƙasar, masu adawa za su ga cewa akwai buƙatar a samu wani jagoran wanda ya fi shi tsattsauran ra'ayi.
Ya zuwa yanzu akasarin maƙaftwan Iran na taka-tsantsan, wasu kuma sun yi gum da bakunansu, suna jira su gani ko afuwar da shugaban ya nema za ta kawo sauyi a halin da ake ciki.
Isra'ila, wadda ke kallon rikicin a matsayin wata dama ta raunana daɗaɗɗiyar maƙiyiyarta, da wuya ta fassara wannan neman afuwa a matsayin wadda ta kai har zuciya.
Akwai dai giɓi da yawa a cikin bayanin Shugaba Pezeshkian, kuma kila da gangan ne.
Zai iya yiwuwa saƙo ne na neman sassauta lamurra a halin da ake ciki, ko kuma wani mataki ne na nema wa Iran ƙarin lokaci ko kuma alamu na sauyin siyasa a ƙasar.
Ko kuma a yanayi irin wannan, zai iya zama duka ukun ne.
=== Kwamandojin sojin Najeriya uku da aka kashe cikin mako ɗaya ===
URL: [URL]
A Najeriya, ana ci gaba da tafka muhawara kan irin ɓarnar da mayaƙan Boko Haram da Iswap suka yi wa rundunar tsaron ƙasar na hallaka mata sojoji manya da ƙanana a wasu hare-hare da suka girgiza ta.
Tuni dai ISWAP ta ɗauki alhakin ƙaddamar da wasu hare-hare kan sansanonin sojin Najeriya a jihar Borno, inda a cikin cikin mako guda kacal ta kashe sojoji da dama bayan kashe fararen hula.
Cikin wata sanarwa da ƙungiyar ta fitar ta hannun kamfanin dillancin labarai na Amaq mai alaƙa da mayaƙan na Iswap, ta ce a makon jiya ne ta ƙaddamar da hare-haren.
Sai dai duk da cewa wasu kafofin yaɗa labaran Najeriya sun bayar da rahoton wasu daga cikin hare-hare, alƙaluman sojojin da suka mutun ya sha bamban da iƙirarin ƙungiyar ta ISWAP.
Sai dai a wani salo da ba a saba gani ba ƙungiyar ta bayar da rahoton mutuwar mayaƙanta da dama a gumurzu da jami'an tsaro a lokacin hare-haren
Ƙungiyar ta yi iƙirarin kai hari sansanonin soji har guda huɗu a cikin dare ɗaya, lamarin da ta ce ya yi sanadin mutuwar sojoji.
Sai dai wasu kafofin yaɗa labaran ƙasar sun ambato sojojin ƙasar na cewa sun samu nasarar daƙile hare-haren mayaƙan na Iswap a wasu sansanonin da ke jihar ta Borno.

Ko a ranar Litinin, 23 ga watan Fabrairu ayarin sojojin da suke raka babban hafsan rundunar sojin ƙasan Najeriya ta 8 sun gwabza faɗa domin tsira daga harin ƙwanton ɓauna da Lakurawa ta kitsa musu a jihar Kebbi da ke arewa maso yamma.
Hare-haren nan na zuwa ne a daidai lokacin da sojojin suke iƙirarin samun nasara a yaƙin da suke yi da matsalolin tsaro a faɗin Najeriya.
topic: military operations and security in Nigeria

text: A cikin mako ɗaya tal, rundunar sojin Najeriya ta rasa aƙalla kwamandojin sojin ƙasar guda uku a hare-hare manya da Iswap ta kai a wurare daban-daban a lokutua daban-daban, kamar yadda Jaridar Daily Trust a ƙasar ta ruwaito.

Sai dain rundunar sojin ba ta fito fili ta bayyana mutuwar kwamandojin nata ba, kodayake cikin wasu sanarwayi da ta fitar a baya-bayan nan ta amince da mutuwar dakarunta, cikin hare da wanda ta bayyana da ''jajirtaccen jagora''.
Rundunar tsaron Najeriyar ta yi asarar aƙalla kwamandoji masu yawa a cikin watanni ƙalilan, ciki har da Birgediya Uba Musa da rahotanni suka ce Iswap sun kashe a watan Nuwamban bara.
Daily Trusta ta ce kwamandojin guda uku da aka kashe a cikin mako ɗaya su ne: Manj U.I.
Mairiga, wanda yake jagorantar sansanin Mayenti da Laftanal kanar Umar Faruq, kwamandan sansanin Birged 101 da ke Kukawa da Laftanal Kanal S.I Iliyasu wanda yake jagorantar sansanin Konduga.
Wani abu da yake ƙara ɗaga hankalin mutane shi ne yadda aka kai yawancin hare-haren har sansanin sojojin, ko kuma aka musu kwanton ɓauna.
Haka kuma a watannin baya ma an kashe kwamandojin soji a Damasak da Kukawa da Bama.
A ranar Litinin, 9 ga watan Maris ne mayaƙan Iswap suka kai hari a sansanin soji da ke ƙaramar hukumar Kukawa a jihar Borno.
Bayanai sun nuna cewa a harin ne mayaƙan suka kashe kwamandan sansanin sojin, Laftanal kanal Umar Faruq tare da wasu sojoji da ba a ƙididdige ba.
A cewar Daily Trust maharan sun kutsa sansanin ne, suka buɗe wuta, inda suka tarwatsa sojojin, suka kuma kashe wasu, sannan suka cinna wa motocin sojoji wuta tare da kwashe makamai.
Kakakin rundunar musamman ta Operation Hadin Kai, Laftanal Kanal Sani Uba ya tabbatar da harin, inda ya ce an kashe wani gwarzon hafsa, amma bai bayyana sunansa ba.
Ko a watan jiya ma rahotanni sun nuna cewa mayaƙan sun yi yunƙurin kutsawa sansanin, amma sojoji suka tare su, tare da tarwatsa su.
A ranar 1 ga watan Maris ne mayaƙan Boko Haram suka kai hari a sansanin soji da ke Mayenti a ƙaramar hukumar Bama.
Harin ya auku ne makonni kaɗan bayan an kashe wasu sojoji a harin da aka kai a sansanin soji da ke Jakana a ƙaramar hukumar Kaga.
A ranar 6 ga watan Maris, kwamandan bataliya ta 222 a Konduga, Laftanal Kanal S.I Iliyasu ya rasu a wani harin mayaƙan Boko Haram, a cewar Jaridar ta Daily Trust.
topic: Military death in Boko Haram attack

text: === Ƴan Najeriya 4 da suka shiga jerin attajiran Afirka na 2026 ===
URL: [URL]
Ƴan Najeriya huɗu sun samu shiga jerin attajiran Afirka 23 na 2026, kamar yadda mujallar Forbes mai nazarin alƙaluman tattalin arziki ta bayyana.
topic: Nigerians in Forbes top Africans list

text: Cikin rahotonta na shekara-shekara mujallar ta ce arzikin attajiran nahiyar Afirka ya yi matuƙar bunƙasa da kashi 21cikin 100 idan aka kwatanta da 2025, inda a yanzu jerin hamshaƙan attajiran nahiyar ke juya jarin dala biliyan 126.7 tsakaninsu.

Ƙasar Afirka ta Kudu ce kan gaba a yawan attajiran da suka shiga jerin, inda take da guda bakwai, yayin da Masar ke biye mata da attajirai biyar a jerin, daga nan sai Najeriya mai huɗu, amma ƴanƙasarta ne gaba-gaba a jerin.
topic: Ranking of African countries by wealth

text: Mujallar ta ce jarin attajiran nahiyar ya yi matuƙar haɓaka, musamman daga bunƙasar kasuwanni da farfaɗowar darajar kuɗi a wasu ƙasashen nahiyar, lamarin da ya haifar musu da riba mai matuƙar gwaɓi.
topic: Business and trade in the region

text: A cikin wannan maƙala mun duba ƴan Najeriya huɗu da suka shiga cikin jerin.
Shugaban rukunin kamfanonin Dangoten ya ci gaba da riƙe matsayinsa na mutumin da ya fi kowa arziki a nahiyar Afirka.
Mujallar ta ce Dangote na da yawan jarin da ya kai dala biliyan 28.5.
A cewar mujallar ta Forbes a shekara mai ƙarewa arzikin attajirin - ɗan asalin jihar Kano da ke arewacin Najeriya - ya ƙaru da kusan dala biliyan 4.6.
Forbes ta alaƙanta ƙaruwar arzikin attajirin da bunƙasar hannayen jarin kamfaninsa na sumunti wanda ya ƙaru matuƙa.
Rahoton na Mujallar Forbes ya ce kamfanin simintin na Dangote ya ninka ribarsa a 2025, inda ya samu ribar naira tiriliyan ɗaya.
Mamallakin katafariyar matatar man fetur mafi girma a Afirkan a baya-bayan nan ya ƙulla yarjejeniyar dala miliyan 400 da wani kamfanin China domin ƙara yawan da matatar ke tacewa nan da 2029.
Mujallar Forbes ta ce shugaban rukunin kamfanonin na BUA ne ya fi kowane attajiri samun riba mafi yawa a Afirka.
A cewar Forbes ƙididdigar jarin attajirin ta ƙaru da kashi 120 cikin 100.
A yanzu ƙarfin jarin attajirin, wanda shi ma ɗan Kano ne a arewacin Najeriyar ya kai dala biliyan 11.2, daga dala biliyan 6.2 da yake a shekarar da ta gabata.
A yanzu Abdulsamad Isyaka Rabiu ne mutum na uku mafi arziki a nahiyar Afirka, daga matsayi na 6 da yake kai a shekarar da ta gabata.
Mujallar Forbes ta ce kamfanin sumunti na BUA ne kan gaba cikin abubuwan da suka ƙara wa attajirin riba da ƙarfin jari.
Shugaban rukunin kamfanonin sadarwa na Globacom, Mike Adenuga ne mutum na uku cikin attajiran Najeriya da suka shiga jerin attajiran na Afirka.
Mujallar Forbes ta ce a yanzu attajirin shi ne mutum na shida cikin jerin attajiran Afirka, wanda ƙarfin jarinsa ya kai dala biliyan 6.5.
Mista Adenuga shi ne shugaban kamfanin mai na Conoil, wanda ya faɗaɗa kasuwancinsa zuwa fannonin sadarwa da harkokin bankuna da cinikayyar mai da iskar gas.
Mike Adenuga ɗan asalin jihar Ogun ne da ke yankin kusu maso yammacin Najeriya.
Ɗan Najeriya cikin na huɗun da ya samu shiga jerin attajiran Afirka shi ne Femi Otedola.
Shugaban kamfanin samar da makamashi na Geregu Power Plc, shi ne mutum na 22 cikin jerin attajiran nahiyar Afirka 23 da mujallar Forbes ta wallafa.

A cewar mujallar ƙarfin jarin attajirin ya kai dala biliyan 1.3, kodayake mujallar ta ce attajirin ya yi asarar dala miliyan 200 saboda sayar da mafi yawan hannayen jarin kamfaninsa na samar da makamashi.
Femi Otedola ɗan asalin jihar Legas ne da ke yankin kudu maso yammacin Najeriya.
=== Liverpool na son Diaby, Pochettino zai koma Real Madrid ===
URL: [URL]
Juventus tana sha'awar sayen dan wasan baya na Tottenham da Ingila Djed Spence, mai shekaru 25, a lokacin bazara.
(Gazzetta dello Sport)

Liverpool na tunanin sayen dan wasan gefe na Al-Ittihad da Faransa Moussa Diaby, mai shekaru 26, yayin da ake sa ran tsohon dan wasan na Aston Villa zai bar kungiyarsa ta Saudi Pro League a wannan bazarar.
(Teamtalk)
Real Madrid na tunanin daukar tsohon kocin Tottenham Mauricio Pochettino don maye gurbin Alvaro Arbeloa a Bernabeu a kakar wasa mai zuwa. (ESPN)
Manchester United ba za ta yi gaggawar nada kocin dindindin ba duk da kocin rikon kwarya Michael Carrick na ci gaba da nuna bajinta.
(The Athletic)
Dan wasan tsakiya na Argentina Alexis Mac Allister, mai shekaru 27, ba ya shirin tattaunawa da Liverpool kan sabuwar yarjejeniya a wannan bazarar (Mundo Deportivo)
Napoli na son tsawaita kwantaragin ɗan wasan tsakiya na Scotland Scott McTominay har zuwa 2030 a ƙoƙarin hana duk wata kungiya daukar dan wasan mai shekaru 29.
(Il Mattino)

Da wuya Manchester City ta amince da wata yarjejeniya wadda za ta sa ɗan wasan tsakiya na Amurka mai hazaka mai shekaru 16 Cavan Sullivan ya koma ƙungiyar MLS ta Philadelphia Union a kakar wasa mai zuwa. (The I)
Tsohon ɗan wasan tsakiya na Tottenham Ryan Mason ne ake sa ran zai maye gurbin Igor Tudor a matsayin kocin riƙon ƙwarya a Spurs.
(Football Insider)
=== Me ya sa Ukraine ta ƙi sayar wa ƙasashen yankin Gulf makaman kariya? ===
URL: [URL]
Ƙasashen yanin Gabas ta Tsakiya da na yankin Gulf da ma Amurka sun buƙaci Ukraine ta sayar wa ƙasashen makaman kakkaɓo jirage marasa matuƙa na ''Shahid' da Iran ke ƙerawa.
Duk da bayar da damar fitar da makamai daga Ukraine da aka yi a baya-bayan nan, Kyiv ba ta bayar da damar sayar da makaman ba.
Sai dai ƙasashe dama musaman na yankin Gulf na cikin zakuwar sayen makamai domin kare kansu daga hare-haren da Iran ke kai musu abaya-bayan nan.
Wani wakilin kamfanin da ke ƙera jiragen ya shaida wa BBC cewa tawagogi da dama daga ƙasashen yankin Gulf na ta zuwa Ukraine domin tattaunawa da jami'an ƙasar game da cinikin makaman.
Ukraine ta samu fasahar ƙera makaman kakkaɓo jirage marasa matuƙar samfurin Shahid da Iran ke ƙerawa, sakamakon yawaitar hare-haren da Rasha ke kai mata da makaman.
Ƙasashen yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya sun jima suna bin Ukraien domin sayar musu da makaman tun gabanin fara yaƙin.
A ranar 12 ga watan Fabrairu ne babban sakataren majalisar tsaron Ukraine, Rustam Umarov, ya ce ƙasar ta samu lasisin sayer da makaman ga ƙasashen waje.
Sai dai har yanzu ba a samu lasisin fara fitar da makaman ba.
Kafofin yaɗa labaran Amurka sun bayar da rahoton cewa, Amurka ta nuna sha'awar makaman bayan da Iran ta kai wa mafi yawan sansanonin sojinta a yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya da jiragen marasa matuƙa.
Sakataren harkokin tsaron Amurka, Pete Hegsett ya tabbatar da cewa jiragen marasa matuƙa da na ''hatsarin gaske'' fiye da yadda ake zato.

A ranar 5 ga watan Maris ne shugaban Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelensky ya ce ƙasarsa ta samu buƙata ta musamman daga Amurka na taimaka wa tsaronta saboda hare-haren jiragen marasa matuƙa a Gabas ta Tsakiya.
A farkon watan Maris ne kamfanonin ƙera makamai na Ukraine suka samu sakonnin imel na buƙatar sayen makaman daga Gabas ta Tsakiya.
Wani ɗan kasuwa ya shaida wa BBC cewa sun samu wasiƙar daga wata hukuma da ya bayayna da ''manyan ƙawaye''
Sai dai a cewar wani rahoto na sashen bincike na sojin ƙasar, ''ɗaya daga cikin hukumomin tsaro'' ta rubutoi wasiƙar.
Sai dai wasiƙar ga gargaɗi kamfanonin ƙera makaman kada ya saɓa ka'idojin fitar da damakaman da gwmantin ke iko da su, kada su faɗa hannun ɓata gari.

Ko shakka babu a yanzu haka ƙasashen yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya na cike da kishirwar irin waɗannan makamai na kariya sakamakon jerin hare-haren jirage masara matuƙa da na makamai masu linzami da Iran ke kai musu.
Kamfanonin Ukraine masu ƙera makaman kakkaɓo jirage marasa matuƙa sun shaida wa BBC cewa wakilan ƙasashen Gabas ta Tsakiya sun tuntuɓe su game da sayen makaman.
topic: arms trade between Ukraine and Middle East

text: To amam sun ce hukumomin Ukraine sun sanya dokoki masu tsauri game da yiwuwar ƙullar yarjejeniyar cinikin.
"Ƙasashen sun nuna sha'awa, amma kowa ya sani irin wannan cinikayya ba za a iya ƙulla shi ba ba tare da sanin gwamnati ba'', a cewar ɗaya daga cikin shugabannin kamfanonin ƙera makaman.
Ɗaya daga cikin kamfanonin na cewa kamfaninsa zai iya ƙera makaman kakkaɓo jiragen na shahid da aka bukata a ilahirin yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya, ba tare da cutar da tsaron Ukraine ba.
Kawo yanzu dai UKraine ba ta bayyana dalilin jan ƙafarta wajen sayar da makaman ga ƙasashen na yankin Gulf ba.
Sai dai wasu na ganin tana yin hakan ne saboda rashin ɗaukar matsayi da mafi yawan ƙasashen suka yi a yaƙin da take yi da Rasha.
Mataimakin shugaban kamfanonin tsaron Ukraine, Sergey Vysotsky, ya shaida wa BBC cewa makaman Ukraien na da farin jini tsakanin ƙasashe tun ma kafin fara yaƙin Iran.
Ya ƙara da cewa an gano haka ƙarara a lokacin bikin baje kolin makamai da aka gudanar a birnin Riyadh na ƙasar Saudiyya a farkon watan Fabrairun da ya gabata.
"Yana da kyau mu ƙara inganta hakan domin bai wa sauran ƙasashe damar hadin gwiwa don mallakarsu,'' in ji shi.
"A yanzu duniya na ƙara nuna sha'awar mallakar makaman Ukraine, musamman yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya, inda Iran take''.
Kawo yanzu dai gwamnatin Ukraine ba bayar da lasisin fitar da makaman ga kamfanonin da ke ƙera makaman ba.
=== Yadda ƙasashen G7 ke ƙoƙarin kaucewa ƙarancin mai a duniya saboda yaƙin Iran ===
URL: [URL]

Ƙasashen ƙungiyar G7 mafiya ƙarfin tattalin arziki a duniya sun ce a shirye suke su ɗauki duk matakin da ya dace domin ganin ba a samu katsewa jigilar mai ba a duniya saboda yaƙin da Amurka da Isra'ila ke yi da Iran, wanda ya janyo tashin farashin man.
Sai dai taron ƙungiyar ministocin kuɗi na ƙungiyar G7 da hukumar kula da makamashi ta ƙasa da ƙasa ya tashi ba tare da an cimma yarjejeniya game da yadda za a wadata duniya da man ba.

A ranar Litinin 9 ga watan Maris farashin gangar ɗanyen mai ya kai $120, bayan fargaba kan katsewar jigilar mai sabida yaƙin, amma farashin ya sauka cikin gaggawa bayan shugaba Trump ya bayar da fatan yaƙin zai ƙare nan ba da jimawa ba.
A yayin taron wanda ya gudana ta na'urar bidiyo an tattauna batun da ya shafi safarar mai a sassan duniya, bayan damuwar da aka nuna game da yadda aka samu koma-baya a fannin cikin kwanakin nan.

Shugaban hukumar kula da makamashi ta duniya Fatih Birol ya shaidawa taron cewa ''baya ga ƙalubalen da ke tattare ga safarar mai ta mashigar Mormuz, akwai kuma matakin da aka ɗauka na rage yawan man da ƙasashe ke samarwa wanda ya yi sanadiyyar fargaba a kasuwar duniya.
"Ƙasashen IEA sun dakatar da ganganr mai fiye da biliyan biyu da miliyan dubu ɗari biyu, baya ga wata ganga miliyan 600 da gwamnatoci suka ajiye don ko ta kwana.'' in ji Birol.
A yayin taron, ministan kudin Faransa, Roland Lescure ya ce "kawo yanzu ba mu cimma matsaya ko za a iya sakin man da aka ajiye domin buƙatar gaggawa ba.''
Idan aka fitar da man da aka ajiye domin gaggawa, matakin zai zamo irinsa na farko tun bayan wanda aka ɗauka a 2022 bayan Rasha ta ƙaddamar da kutse cikin Ukraine.

Sanarwar da ta fitar bayan taron, ƙungiyar G7 ta ce: "A shirye muke mu ɗauki dukkan matakan da suka wajaba domin wadata duniya da mai, ko da kuwa hakan zai kai ga taɓa ajiyar da aka yi domin shiryawa ɓacin rana.''

Katsewar da aka samu ta jigilar mai a gabas ta tsakiya ta janyo barazanar hauhawar farashin mai a sassan duniya lamarin da ya shafi masana'antu da kamfanoni, ya kuma tilastawa manyan bankunan duniya rage yawan kudin ruwa.
Aƙalla kashi biyar na man da ake amfani da shi a duniya na kaiwa ga ƙasashe ne ta mashigar Mormuz.
Amma an dakatar da duk wata jigila ta mashigar tun bayan fara yaƙin, fiye da mako guda da ya gabata.
A ƙarshen makon da ya gabata haɗakar Amurka da Isra'ila ta ƙaddamar da sabbin hare-hare kan Iran, kuma ta tarwatsa wurare da dama cki harda matatun mai.
Itama Iran ta mayar da martani ta hanyar kai hare-hare kan ƙasashen yankin Gulf.
Saudiyya ta ce ta daƙile wasu hare-haren cikin dare da aka ƙaddamar kan matatun mai a ƙasarta.

Adnan Mazarei na cibiyar nazarin tattalin arzikin duniya ta Peterson Institute for International Economics ya ce dama an yi zaton samun tashin farashin na mai, saboda yadda wasu ƙasashen gabas ta tsakiya suka dakatar da aikin tace man, da kuma tasirin da yaƙin Amurka da Isra'ila ka Iran zai haifar a yankin.
Ya ce "A yanzu mutane sun fahimci cewa yaƙin ba zai ƙare cikin sauri ba, kuma alƙawurran da Amurka ta yi a kai suna ƙara zama abubuwan da ba za su tabbata ba.''
